Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PEERLESS INDUSTRIES, INC'S PARTIAL DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (5th cause of action)

Appearances:
Jason K. Nelson of Gordon & Rees (986.5900) for plaintiffs and responding parties
Rohit A. Sabnis of Burnham Brown (510.444.6800) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court modified its ruling as follows:
Demurrer is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to allow plaintiff to plead in a way that will not expose Peerless to the potential of two different actions. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/HEK) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR#7235
